overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring a castle wall at sunset. The character walks along historic stone battlements under dramatic red skies, stops to observe a burning village in the distance, then returns to enter a stone doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone stairway ascending to castle wall

events.description: emerging from narrow stone passage onto open castle wall battlements

agents.ego_description: climbing up from a narrow stairway and stepping onto the castle wall walkway

entered.detail: crenellated stone defensive walls with merlons
tall cylindrical stone tower with conical roof
metal fire basket burning with orange flames
wooden support structures and planks along the wall

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow stone passage looking upward, then transitions to an open castle wall at dusk. The camera ascends to reveal stone battlements, a lit brazier, and a tall tower against a dramatic red sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle wall walkway with battlements and fire pit

events.description: turning right to follow the curved path of the wall
passing close to the lit brazier, firelight casts warm orange glow on stone walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone battlements, passing wooden structures and a burning brazier

entered.detail: round wooden table with clay pots and items on top
dark stone doorway leading to interior corridor

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along the castle wall walkway, passing a burning brazier that illuminates the stone battlements. The camera follows as he moves past wooden scaffolding and a wooden table, with the stone tower visible in the background against the red sunset sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle wall edge overlooking burning village below

events.description: stopping at the crenellated wall edge to look down at the landscape
camera pans down to reveal burning village with smoke and fire visible in the valley

agents.ego_description: standing at the wall edge, looking down at the distant burning village and smoke plumes

entered.detail: village in the valley below with multiple fires burning and smoke rising
wooden barrel with metal bands near the wall edge

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the crenellated edge of the castle wall to observe the vista. The camera pans to reveal a burning village in the distant valley below, with smoke rising against the darkening red sky. A wooden barrel sits near the wall edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle wall walkway returning to interior entrance

events.description: turning away from the wall edge to walk back toward the interior doorway
approaching and entering the stone doorway into the dark interior

agents.ego_description: turning away from the vista and walking back along the wall toward a stone doorway, entering the building

entered.detail: dark stone corridor visible through the doorway

segments.scene_description: Geralt turns away from the burning village view and walks back along the castle wall. He passes the wooden table again and approaches a stone doorway, entering the dark interior corridor as the segment ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined stone passage out onto an expansive castle wall under a dramatic red sunset. It begins by ascending from the narrow corridor to reveal open battlements, a lit brazier, and a tall tower silhouetted against the crimson sky. As Geralt walks along the walkway, the camera follows him past wooden scaffolding and a table, moving toward the crenellated edge of the wall. The scene then opens into a wide vista as the camera pans to reveal a burning village in the distant valley below, with smoke rising into the darkening atmosphere. Finally, the character turns away from the horizon and retraces his steps past the wooden furniture before entering a dark stone doorway.
